Logs

setyawanadi Mar 14

caught this view from the office right before leaving. sometimes you just gotta stop and look outside for a bit.

S
setyawanadi Mar 13

2am and the code finally works. don’t ask me how. don’t ask me to explain it tomorrow. it works and that’s all that matters right now.

S
setyawanadi Mar 12

what does everybody do for fun these days?

S
setyawanadi Mar 11

the new keyboard

finally pulled the trigger on a 65% layout. the thock is immaculate. coworkers might hate me but that’s a sacrifice i’m willing to make.

S
setyawanadi Mar 10

new desk setup

finally got the monitor arm mounted. cable management is chef’s kiss. productivity through the roof (for about 2 hours before I started browsing reddit again).

S
setyawanadi Mar 9

weekend hike

took the long trail this time. legs are destroyed but the view at the top was worth every step. need to do this more often instead of staring at screens all day.

S
setyawanadi Mar 8

why do the best ideas come at 3am when you’re half asleep and have no way to write them down properly

S
setyawanadi Mar 7

found the best nasi goreng spot

tucked away in a random alley near the old market. the uncle who runs it has been there for 20 years apparently. absolute legend. going back tomorrow.

S
setyawanadi Mar 5

learning astro

been playing with astro for a few days now. the content collections thing is actually pretty neat. might rebuild my whole site with it.

oh wait, I already did.

S
setyawanadi Feb 28

important coffee ranking

  1. v60 pour over
  2. aeropress
  3. cold brew
  4. espresso
  5. instant (don’t judge me, sometimes it’s 6am)

this is non-negotiable.
